note: Source-of-truth benchmark descriptors for the Mac-side `tinygpt score-bench` command. Each entry tells the scorer how to evaluate a model and where to write the result back into the gallery manifest. Mirrors `browser/src/benchmarks/*` for the three browser-side benches but adds BPE-aware entries that the byte-level WASM path cannot run.

benchmarks.name: TinyStories PPL
benchmarks.description: Held-out perplexity on a 50-story TinyStories slice. The score-bench command joins stories on \n\n, encodes via the model's tokenizer (BPE) or as raw bytes (vocab=256), and computes exp(mean per-token cross-entropy).

benchmarks.name: Sort-6
benchmarks.description: Karpathy minGPT sort task. Byte-level only — BPE tokenizers break the digit-by-space prompt format the trial generator emits.

benchmarks.name: Reverse-16
benchmarks.description: Reverse a 4-16 char lowercase string. Byte-level only.

benchmarks.name: FineWeb PPL (BPE)
benchmarks.description: BPE-only perplexity benchmark on a 5MB FineWeb-style holdout. Scores native-trained BPE checkpoints (e.g. flagship-huge) that the byte-level browser scorer cannot run.
